student_verification.name: AML Part B Student
student_verification.declaration: I confirm that all LLM interactions listed below are complete and accurate, and that all decisions regarding ablation choices, failure mode identification, and honest reflection are my own.

interactions.prompt: I need a synthetic binary sentiment dataset for testing NBSVM. What design choices should I make?
interactions.response_summary: Suggested overlapping vocabulary with noise injection, balanced classes, ~15 word snippets. Explained why overlap matters.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only

interactions.prompt: What preprocessing does the Wang & Manning paper use?
interactions.response_summary: Quoted Section 4.1: no stopwords, no lexicons, binary features, α=1, C=1, β=0.25.
interactions.student_modification: N/A — code was rewritten based on conceptual guidance only

interactions.prompt: Help me write a CountVectorizer setup for binarized unigrams and bigrams.
interactions.response_summary: Suggested CountVectorizer(ngram_range=(1,1), binary=True, min_df=2). Explained binary=True implements Section 2.1 binarization.
interactions.student_modification: Changed ngram_range and min_df to match paper's setup; added comment referencing Section 2.1; integrated into full pipeline.
